feedback.text: Game publishers should not be able to revoke access to already paid for products. By virtue of them having access to this, it makes the business more predatory and more prone to bad practices, such as discontinuing games for the sake of earning more revenue with new releases. By making it so games need an end-of-life plan, this ensures that products will be released with better intentions and protects the consumer from spending money on something that can potentially be taken away from them without proper reason.
